constraint_summary: 完整 synthetic repo；显式 target_files 收窄；Python；非 PT
top_3_findings: [{"title": "无防护的 Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)", "severity": "critical", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "ssrf", "confidence": 1.0}, {"title": "utils/http_utils.py:6 - requests.get(url) 直接使用未经验证的 URL 发起请求，无协议限制、无内网 IP 过滤、无 DNS 重绑定防护", "severity": "high", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 0.6}, {"title": "代理响应内容未脱敏直接返回客户端", "severity": "high", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 1.0}]
notes: 首条 finding 直接命中 SSRF，前两条集中在 route→service→utils 传播链，说明显式收窄在非 PT synthetic repo 上仍有效；但 278 秒、159260 tokens 对 3 文件 synthetic repo 仍偏高，且混入响应回传类扩展告警。

constraint_summary: 完整 synthetic repo；无 target_files；Python；非 PT
top_3_findings: [{"title": "未防护的服务端请求伪造 (SSRF) 漏洞", "severity": "high", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "ssrf", "confidence": 0.95}, {"title": "services/proxy_service.py:5-6 - ProxyService.fetch_remote()直接将用户URL传给底层HTTP函数，无验证层", "severity": "high", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 0.6}, {"title": "utils/http_utils.py:4-7 - get_url()使用requests.get()直接请求任意URL，无SSRF防护（无内网IP过滤、无协议限制、无DNS重绑定防护）", "severity": "high", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "ssrf", "confidence": 0.6}]
notes: 同样稳定命中 SSRF，但无 target_files 时更容易展开到 service、app 注册与结构层说明，呈现更分散的 agent 编排路径；这次 wall clock 未显著更差，但 iterations 与 tool calls 更高。

top_3_findings: [{"title": "Jinja2 服务端模板注入（SSTI）导致远程代码执行 - CVE-2024-45053", "severity": "critical", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 0.7}, {"title": "MessagingTemplate.content 字段无安全校验，允许存储恶意 Jinja2 模板", "severity": "high", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 0.7}, {"title": "src/fides/api/service/messaging/message_dispatch_service.py:481-483 - PRIVACY_REQUEST_REVIEW_DENY: 将", "severity": "high", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 0.6}]
notes: 第二条 real-world 项目线成功命中 SSTI/CVE-2024-45053，首条 finding 直接落在 `_render` / `Environment().from_string()` 的核心风险上，前 3 条仍围绕模板内容来源与调用路径展开；在仅 2 个 target_files 下以 220 秒、137788 tokens 完成，质量与成本都优于 PT repeat，说明 `C-real-world` 的可用性不只存在于 Litestar/PT 个案。

top_3_findings: [{"title": "_build_email 函数中多处调用不安全的 _render 函数", "severity": "critical", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 0.95}, {"title": "默认模板使用 Jinja2 变量语法暴露攻击面", "severity": "medium", "file_path": null, "vulnerability_type": "other", "confidence": 0.6}]
notes: 最终仍收敛到真实目标链路，首条 finding 已落在 `_build_email -> _render` 的 SSTI 攻击面上，但 framing 比 `C-real-world-SSTI` 更泛化，且代价极高：3412 文件、47 iterations、41 tool calls、748569 tokens、596 秒；这条结果强烈说明完整 real-world 大仓库下的 D 形态会用高成本硬换目标信号。
